routing_source: user task benchmark routing; benchmark_report.md was not present in repository during configuration

roles.fail_behavior: write blocked_ollama_unavailable QA; do not generate final narrative; do not overwrite accepted artifacts

judge verdict block on unsupported claims or unavailable judge; fallback may be used only for invalid JSON/schema recovery and must not override a valid unfavorable verdict; do not overwrite accepted artifacts
keep analyst draft as not accepted; write QA blocker; do not overwrite accepted artifacts

final memo narrative remains blocked unless verdict is accept or explicit human approval is recorded; fallback may be used only for invalid JSON/schema recovery and must not override a valid unfavorable verdict

global_rules: Ollama is not a calculation engine.
All metrics, formulas, sums, percentages, ranks, slices and charts must remain deterministic.
Ollama may only write, review and polish narrative based on accepted evidence.
If Ollama is unavailable, deterministic package remains valid but narrative status is blocked_ollama_unavailable.
No final DOCX is generated or overwritten by this pipeline without explicit approval.

Judge gate follows evidence-first rules: FACT/CALCULATION require primary evidence, numeric claims require metric_ref, and secondary narrative alone is not enough for executive claims or recommendations.
Fallback judge is schema recovery only; it must use the same acceptance criteria and must not lower thresholds.
